# Valid estimates generated by sparse beam search plus MITM verification
# Format required by the problem statement: @(r, u, v, VE, VT)
@(4, 0x0000B000, 0x022222A2, 0.007812500000000, 0.007812500000000)
@(4, 0x0000B000, 0x022222AA, 0.007812500000000, 0.007812500000000)
@(4, 0xB0000000, 0x22A20222, 0.007812500000000, 0.007812500000000)
@(4, 0xB0000000, 0x22AA0222, 0.007812500000000, 0.007812500000000)
@(4, 0xB0000000, 0x2AA20AAA, 0.007812500000000, 0.007812500000000)
@(4, 0xB0000000, 0x2AAA0AAA, 0.007812500000000, 0.007812500000000)
